title: Preserve wave history and configure closeout-only acceptance proof
description: Preserve stable completed/current/upcoming wave identity and dashboard history across re-graphs that omit closed tasks; no renumbering/disappearance. Add controller-owned closeout-only evidence command configuration distinct from post-wave Testing so expensive/live acceptance commands do not run every implementation wave. Strict item mappings may reference exact Testing or exact Closeout Evidence Commands, never tracker text. Configure qfs A1-A6 with semantic commands including package discovery, dry run, real disposable lifecycle, dashboard and docs checks. Add tests/docs.
notes: 2026-07-15 14:38 - Dispatched on tick/qfs/8nc via openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol:high; no .tick mutations by child.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard retains all wave history with stable numbering; qfs has trusted semantically scoped A1-A6 evidence; live scenario runs only at closeout; missing/cross-item injection fails; tests pass.
closed_reason: Added stable cumulative wave history and closeout-only config-owned acceptance proof; configured qfs A1-A6 commands.
